description_long: This is a small, single-story cabin with a simple rectangular footprint and a dark, gabled roof. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in wood or painted siding, and the roof appears to be made of dark shingles or tiles. There are a few small, square windows distributed along the visible sides, providing natural light to the interior. A single door is present on one of the longer facades, slightly offset from the center, and there is no visible porch or overhang. The cabin sits on a flat, circular base, suggesting it is intended as a standalone structure. The overall design is compact and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a rustic, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A compact, rectangular cabin with a dark gabled roof, light walls, and small square windows. The design is simple and rustic, with a single door and no porch.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from an angle showing the gabled roof and two visible walls, with a small window and the main door apparent.
description_view_1: This view shows the longer facade with the door and a window, highlighting the rectangular shape and the dark roof.
description_view_2: The opposite gable end is visible, showing a plain wall with a small window and the roof's pitch.
description_view_3: The rear side of the cabin is shown, featuring a window and the continuation of the simple, rectangular form.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple small, square windows spaced asymmetrically along the visible facades
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door on the longer facade, slightly offset from center
